headline: Jim Cramer on Reddit (RDDT): “I Want to Buy Reddit Right Here”
summary: Reddit, Inc. (NYSE:RDDT) was featured on Mad Money as Jim Cramer shared his take on the stock amid a sliding macro environment. Answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer said: Yes, Reddit went down today because of these lawsuits. I’m going to take these lawsuits on in a very heavy fashion soon. I want […]

headline: Market Week Ahead: Scarcity Narratives And Naval Tactics
summary: Stock market investors head into the Good Friday/Easter week focused on the impact of the Iran war on U.S. and global economies.

headline: ICOTYDE™ (icotrokinra) one-year results confirm lasting skin clearance and favorable safety profile in once‑daily pill for plaque psoriasis
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced new long-term 52-week data from the Phase 3 ICONIC-ADVANCE 1 and 2 and ICONIC-LEAD studies, which assessed the efficacy and safety of ICOTYDE™ (icotrokinra) in the treatment of patients with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis (PsO). ICOTYDE is the first and only targeted oral peptide that precisely blocks the IL-23 receptor.1 These data are being presented at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting.

headline: PPH ETF: Drug Pricing Policy and Eli Lilly Concentration Are the Two Risks to Watch in 2026
summary: VanEck Pharmaceutical ETF (NYSEARCA:PPH) exists to give investors broad exposure to the global pharmaceutical industry without the binary risk of betting on a single drug pipeline. Right now, that diversification is being tested by two forces pulling in opposite directions: sweeping U.S. drug pricing policy and a dangerous level of concentration in one stock. The ... headline: Johnson & Johnson Oncology And Immunology Advances Test Valuation Story
summary: European Medicines Agency approved Johnson & Johnson’s Darzalex for self-administration across ten oncology indications, making it the first oncology injectable in Europe cleared for at home use. US FDA approved ICOTYDE, an oral IL-23 receptor antagonist, for adults with moderate to severe plaque psoriasis. Johnson & Johnson entered a clinical supply agreement with GI Innovation for a phase 1b prostate cancer trial. These recent product approvals and R&D collaborations expand NYSE:JNJ’s...
